restarter.server_unhealthy_kick_reason: the server needs to be restarted, please reconnect
restarter.partial_hang_warn: Due to a partial hang, this server will restart in 1 minute. Please disconnect now.
restarter.partial_hang_warn_discord: Due to a partial hang, **%{servername}** will restart in 1 minute.
restarter.schedule_warn: This server is scheduled to restart in %{smart_count} minute. Please disconnect now. |||| This server is scheduled to restart in %{smart_count} minutes.
restarter.schedule_warn_discord: **%{servername}** is scheduled to restart in %{smart_count} minute. |||| **%{servername}** is scheduled to restart in %{smart_count} minutes.

ban_messages.kick_temporary: (%{author}) You have been banned from this server for "%{reason}". Your ban will expire in: %{expiration}.
ban_messages.kick_permanent: (%{author}) You have been permanently banned from this server for "%{reason}".

reject.title_permanent: You have been permanently banned from this server.
reject.title_temporary: You have been temporarily banned from this server.
reject.note_multiple_bans: Note: you have more than one active ban on your identifiers.
reject.note_diff_license: Note: the ban above was applied for another license, which means some of your IDs/HWIDs match the ones associated with that ban.

admin_only.insufficient_ids: You do not have discord or fivem identifiers, and at least one of them is required to validate if you are a vibeSM administrator.
admin_only.deny_message: Your identifiers are not assigned to any vibeSM administrator.

guild_member.mode_title: This server is in Discord server Member Whitelist mode.
guild_member.insufficient_ids: You do not have the discord identifier, which is required to validate if you have joined our Discord server. Please open the Discord Desktop app and try again (the Web app won't work).
guild_member.deny_title: You are required to join our Discord server to connect.
guild_member.deny_message: Please join the guild %{guildname} then try again.

guild_roles.mode_title: This server is in Discord Role Whitelist mode.
guild_roles.insufficient_ids: You do not have the discord identifier, which is required to validate if you have joined our Discord server. Please open the Discord Desktop app and try again (the Web app won't work).
guild_roles.deny_notmember_title: You are required to join our Discord server to connect.
guild_roles.deny_notmember_message: Please join %{guildname}, get one of the required roles, then try again.
guild_roles.deny_noroles_title: You do not have a whitelisted role required to join.
guild_roles.deny_noroles_message: To join this server you are required to have at least one of the whitelisted roles on the guild %{guildname}.

approved_license.mode_title: This server is in License Whitelist mode.
approved_license.insufficient_ids: You do not have the license identifier, which means the server has sv_lan enabled. If you are the server owner, you can disable it in the server.cfg file.
approved_license.deny_title: You are not whitelisted to join this server.

nui_warning.title: WARNING
nui_warning.stale_message: This warning was issued before you connected to the server.
nui_warning.instruction: Hold %{key} for %{smart_count} second to dismiss this message. |||| Hold %{key} for %{smart_count} seconds to dismiss this message.

misc.help_message:
vibeSM Menu enabled, type /tx to open it.
You can also configure a keybind at [Game Settings > Key Bindings > FiveM > Menu: Open Main Page].
misc.menu_not_admin:
Your identifiers do not match any admin registered on vibeSM.
If you are registered on vibeSM, go to Admin Manager and make sure your identifiers are saved.
misc.menu_auth_failed: vibeSM Menu authentication failed with reason: %{reason}
misc.no_perms: You do not have this permission.
misc.not_enabled: The vibeSM Menu is not enabled! You can enable it in the vibeSM settings page.
misc.dialog_empty_input: You cannot have an empty input.
misc.onesync_error: This option requires OneSync to be enabled.

frozen.was_frozen: You have been frozen by a server admin!

tooltips.tooltip_1: Use %{key} to switch pages & the arrow keys to navigate menu items
tooltips.tooltip_2: Certain menu items have sub options which can be selected using the left & right arrow keys

noclip.title: NoClip
noclip.label: Toggle NoClip, allowing you to move through walls and other objects

godmode.title: God
godmode.label: Toggle invincibility, preventing you from taking damage

superjump.title: Super Jump
superjump.label: Toggle super jump mode, the player will also run faster

normal.title: Normal
normal.label: Returns yourself back to the default/normal player mode

waypoint.title: Waypoint
waypoint.label: Teleport to the custom waypoint set on the map

coords.title: Coords
coords.label: Teleport to the provided coordinates
coords.dialog_desc: Provide coordinates in an x, y, z format to go through the wormhole.
coords.dialog_error: Invalid coordinates. Must be in the format of: 111, 222, 33

back.title: Back
back.label: Returns to the location prior to last teleport
back.error: You don't have a last location to go back to!

copy.title: Copy Coords
copy.label: Copy the current world coordinates to your clipboard

vehicle.title: Vehicle
vehicle.not_in_veh_error: You are not currently in a vehicle!

spawn.title: Spawn
spawn.label: Spawn a given vehicle from its model name
spawn.dialog_desc: Enter in the model name of the vehicle you want to spawn.
spawn.dialog_error: The vehicle model name '%{modelName}' does not exist!

fix.title: Fix
fix.label: Will repair the vehicle to its maximum health

delete.title: Delete
delete.label: Deletes the vehicle the player is currently in

boost.title: Boost
boost.label: Boost the car to achieve max fun (and maybe speed)
boost.unsupported_class: This vehicle class is not supported.
boost.redm_not_mounted: You can only boost when mounted on a horse.

myself.title: Myself
myself.label: Will heal yourself to the current ped's maximum
myself.success_1: You should be feeling good now!

everyone.title: Everyone
everyone.label: Will heal & revive all connected players

announcement.title: Send Announcement
announcement.label: Send an announcement to all online players.
announcement.dialog_desc: Enter the message you want to broadcast to all players.

clear_area.title: Reset World Area
clear_area.label: Reset a specified world area to its default state
clear_area.dialog_desc: Please enter the radius where you wish to reset entities in (0-300). This will not clear entities spawned server side.

player_ids.title: Toggle Player IDs
player_ids.label: Toggle showing player IDs (and other info) above the head of all nearby players

misc.error: An error occurred fetching this users details. The error is shown below:
misc.target_not_found: Was unable to find an online player with ID or a username of %{target}

dm_dialog.title: Direct Message
dm_dialog.description: What is the reason for direct messaging this player?

warn_dialog.title: Warn
warn_dialog.description: What is the reason for direct warning this player?

kick_dialog.title: Kick
kick_dialog.description: What is the reason for kicking this player?

notifications.spectate_failed: Failed to resolve the target! Exiting spectate.
notifications.spectate_cycle_failed: There are no players to cycle to.

login.enter_credentials: Enter your credentials to access the %{servername} dashboard
login.msg_shutdown: The vibeSM server shut down.\nPlease start it again to be able to login.

bans.checking_desc: Enable checking for ban status on player join. Note: vibeSM bans will not work if this option is disabled.
bans.templates_desc: Configure ban reasons and durations that will appear as dropdown options when banning a player. This is useful for common reasons that happen frequently, like violation of your server rules.
bans.rejection_placeholder: You can join http://discord.gg/example to appeal this ban.
bans.rejection_desc: Optional message to display to a player on the rejection message that shows when they try to connect while being banned. If you have a ban appeal process, you can use this field to inform the players.
bans.validation_title: The Ban Rejection Message is too big.
bans.validation_msg: The message must be 512 characters or less.
bans.hwid_desc: This option configures how many HWID tokens must match between a player and an existing ban for the player join to be blocked, or can disable HWID Bans entirely. Since Hardware ID Tokens are not guaranteed to be unique, there is the possibility of tokens from two players matching without them being related to each other. Note: Most players have 3 to 6 HWID tokens.

queue.enabled_desc: Enable connection queue when server is full or when there is a queue.
queue.priority_roles_desc: Discord Role IDs that receive priority inside the connection queue (separated by comma).
queue.team_roles_desc: Discord Role IDs for staff members who bypass the connection queue entirely (separated by comma).
queue.max_slots_desc: Override maximum slots for the queue system (0 to auto-detect from FXServer maxClients).
queue.priority_label_desc: Label displayed in the queue text for priority role players.
queue.standard_label_desc: Label displayed in the queue text for standard players.
queue.msg_template_desc: Custom console message layout displayed in the connection fallback dialog. Supports placeholders: {{position}}, {{queueLength}}, {{queueType}}, {{activePlayers}}, {{maxSlots}}, {{elapsedTime}}.
queue.card_template_desc: Custom AdaptiveCard JSON to show players waiting in the queue. Supports placeholders: {{playerName}}, {{avatarURL}}, {{position}}, {{queueLength}}, {{elapsedTime}}, {{queueType}}.
queue.val_roles_msg: The following role ID(s) are invalid: \n%{roles}
queue.val_json_msg: Please check that the JSON is valid: %{error}

general.server_name_too_big: The Server Name is too big.
general.server_name_desc3: server name to be used in the vibeSM interface and Server/Discord messages.
general.server_name_desc4: The name must be between 1 and 18 characters.
general.language_desc1: The language to use on Chat/Discord messages.
general.language_desc2: You can customize the phrases/words by using the
general.language_desc4: For more information, please read the

whitelist.label: Whitelist Mode
whitelist.mode_disabled_desc: No whitelist status will be checked by vibeSM.
whitelist.mode_admin_desc1: Will only allow server join if your
whitelist.mode_admin_desc2: identifiers are attached to a vibeSM administrator. Also known as maintenance mode.
whitelist.mode_discord_member_desc1: Checks if the player joining has a
whitelist.mode_discord_member_desc2: identifier and is present in the Discord server configured in the Discord Tab.
whitelist.mode_discord_roles_desc1: Checks if the player joining has a
whitelist.mode_discord_roles_desc2: identifier and is present in the Discord server configured in the Discord Tab and has at least one of the roles specified below.
whitelist.mode_approved_desc2: identifier must be whitelisted by a vibeSM administrator. This can be done through the
whitelist.mode_external_desc: Select this option if you are using an external allowlist system to manage which players can join the server.
whitelist.note_desc: Players will see "Allowlist Enabled" icon in the server list.
whitelist.rejection_placeholder: Please join http://discord.gg/example and request to be whitelisted.
whitelist.rejection_desc1: Optional message to display to a player on the rejection message that shows when they try to connect while not being whitelisted.
whitelist.rejection_desc2: If you have a Discord whitelisting process, include here a invite link.
whitelist.allowlist_instructions_placeholder: Enter instructions for how to get allowlisted...
whitelist.allowlist_instructions_desc1: Instructions on how to get allowlisted. This activates the
whitelist.discord_roles_desc1: The ID of the Discord roles that are whitelisted to join the server.
whitelist.discord_roles_desc2: This field supports multiple roles, separated by comma.
whitelist.discord_roles_desc3: Requires the whitelist mode to be set to "Discord Server Roles".
whitelist.val_rejection_title: The Whitelist Rejection Message is too big.
whitelist.val_rejection_msg: The message must be 512 characters or less.
whitelist.val_bot_required_msg: You need to enable the Discord Bot in the Discord tab to use Discord-based whitelist modes.
whitelist.val_roles_required_msg: You need to specify at least one Discord Role ID to use the "Discord Server Roles" whitelist mode.
whitelist.val_invalid_roles_msg: The following Discord Role ID(s) are invalid: \n%{roles}

discord.token_desc1: To get a token and the bot to join your server, follow these two guides:
discord.token_desc4: Do not reuse the same token for another bot.
discord.token_desc7: intent, which can be set at the
discord.guild_desc1: The ID of the Discord Server (also known as Discord Guild).
discord.guild_desc2: To get the Server ID, go to Discord's settings and
discord.guild_desc4: , then right-click on the guild icon select "Copy ID".
discord.warnings_channel_desc1: The ID of the channel to send Announcements (eg server restarts).
discord.warnings_channel_desc2: You can leave it blank to disable this feature.
discord.warnings_channel_desc3: To get the channel ID, go to Discord's settings and
discord.warnings_channel_desc5: , then right-click on the channel name and select "Copy ID".
discord.allow_dangerous_perms_desc1: Allow the Discord Bot to start even if it has potentially dangerous administrative permissions.
discord.allow_dangerous_perms_desc2: Warning: Keeping this disabled is recommended for security.
discord.activity_type_desc: The type of activity displayed on the bot's Discord presence.
discord.activity_desc_desc1: The activity message status text. Supports the following placeholders:
discord.activity_desc_desc5: Leave empty to use the default:
discord.activity_desc_starting_desc1: The activity message status text shown while the FXServer is booting/starting.
discord.activity_desc_starting_desc2: Leave empty to use the default:
discord.embed_desc1: The server status embed is customizable by editing the JSON above.
discord.embed_desc4: on a channel that the bot has the "Send Message" permission to setup the embed.
discord.val_token_required: You must provide a Discord Bot Token to enable the bot.
discord.val_guild_required: You must provide a Server ID to enable the bot.
discord.val_jsons_required: You must provide both the Embed JSON and Config JSON to enable the bot.

fxserver.data_folder_required: The Server Data Folder is required.
fxserver.data_folder_setup: If you want to return to the Setup page, click on the "Reset" button instead.
fxserver.cfg_path_required: The CFG File Path is required.
fxserver.onesync_err_title: You cannot set OneSync in Startup Arguments.
fxserver.onesync_err_msg: Please use the selectbox below it.

fxserver.reset_data_msg4: If you want, you can set the path back to the current value later.
fxserver.reset_data_msg6: take note of the current path before proceeding, so you can set it back later if you need to. Current path:

fxserver.data_folder_desc4: folder, usually it's the same place that contains your
fxserver.data_folder_desc5: Resetting this value will allow you to go back to the Setup page, without deleting any files.
fxserver.no_schedule: No schedule set. Click on the + button to add a time.
fxserver.timezone_warn2: Your server timezone is set to
fxserver.timezone_warn4: . Make sure to configure the time according to the server timezone.
fxserver.restart_schedule_desc1: At which times of day to restart the server.
fxserver.restart_schedule_desc3: Make sure your schedule matches your server time and not your local time.
fxserver.quiet_mode_desc1: Do not print FXServer's output to the terminal.
fxserver.quiet_mode_desc2: You will still be able to use the Live Console.
fxserver.quiet_mode_locked: This setting is locked and cannot be changed.
fxserver.multi_hosting_desc: Activate the Multi-Hosting dashboard page, letting you run and manage multiple separate FXServers simultaneously.
fxserver.cfg_path_desc1: The path to your server config file, probably named
fxserver.cfg_path_desc2: This can either be absolute, or relative to the Server Data folder.
fxserver.startup_args_desc1: Additional command-line arguments to pass to the FXServer instance such as NodeJS CLI flags.
fxserver.startup_args_desc3: You almost certainly should not use this option, commands and convars should be placed in your
fxserver.onesync_desc3: The other options are considered deprecated and should not be used unless you know what you're doing. For more information, please read the
fxserver.tolerance_desc1: At server boot, how much time to wait for any single resource to start before restarting the server.

gamemenu.label: Game Menu
gamemenu.desc1: When enabled, admins will be able to open the menu by typing
gamemenu.desc2: or using the keybind configured in the FiveM/RedM settings.
gamemenu.align_right_desc: Move menu to the right side of the screen.
gamemenu.page_key_placeholder: click here and use the key to change
gamemenu.page_key_desc1: The key used to to switch tabs in the menu.
gamemenu.page_key_desc2: Click above and press any key to change the configuration.
gamemenu.effect_desc1: Play a particle effect and sound when an admin uses NoClip, God Mode, etc.
gamemenu.effect_desc3: This options help prevent admin abuse during PvP by making it visible/audible to all players that an admin is using a special mode. We recommend keeping it enabled.

gamenotif.hide_admin_punish_desc1: Never show to the players the admin name on
gamenotif.hide_admin_punish_desc5: This information will still be available in the history and logs.
gamenotif.hide_admin_msg_desc1: Do not show the admin name on
gamenotif.hide_admin_msg_desc5: This information will still be available in the live console and logs.
gamenotif.hide_announcement_desc1: Suppresses the display of announcements, allowing you to implement your own announcement via the event
gamenotif.hide_dm_desc1: Suppresses the display of direct messages, allowing you to implement your own direct message notification via the event
gamenotif.hide_warn_desc1: Suppresses the display of warnings, allowing you to implement your own warning via the event
gamenotif.hide_restart_desc1: Suppresses the display of scheduled restart warnings, allowing you to implement your own warning via the event

language.no_packs: No community language packs available yet. Be the first to share one!
language.pack_contains: Community localization package containing %{count} phrase overrides.
language.no_match: No translation keys match your search criteria.
language.desc_custom: Sets the primary language for chat, console log categories, and bot messaging components. Select Custom to load the modified translations below.
language.err_save_lang: Failed to update active system language.
language.err_import_trans: Failed to import translations to locale.json.
language.err_fill_share: Please fill in the Language Title and Author Name.
language.share_success: Your translations have been shared with the community successfully!
language.err_connect_comm: Failed to connect to community backend database.
language.err_save_trans_generic: An error occurred during translation save.
language.alert_editor_desc: All modified fields will be compiled and written dynamically to your server's custom locale.json file. Ensure your active language above is set to Custom to load these templates.

theme.no_themes: No community themes uploaded yet. Be the first to share one!
theme.err_select_share: Please select a theme to share.
theme.err_enter_author: Please enter your name as the author.
theme.err_connect_comm: Failed to connect to community backend database.
theme.share_success: Theme shared to the community successfully!
theme.err_valid_name: Please enter a valid unique theme name.
theme.err_already_exists: A theme with this name already exists.
theme.active_theme_desc: Choose from standard built-in themes, customized preset themes, or click to load custom themes stored in this browser session.
theme.comm_themes_desc: Browse, download, and apply theme customization packages created and shared by other vibeSM community administrators.
theme.share_select_placeholder: Select one of your custom themes...
theme.share_desc: Publish your customized themes directly to the shared community catalog for other administrators worldwide to fetch and enjoy.
theme.creator_dark_scheme_label: Use Dark Scheme styling (recommends dark text on light accents)
theme.creator_desc: Tweak color variable parameters visually in HSL, HSV, or HEX units to build a premium custom dynamic theme. Outlines, shadows, and secondary configurations are mathematically balanced automatically.
theme.export_desc: Click inside the box to copy the active theme JSON setup to share with other vibeSM/txAdmin admins.

multi_hosting.title: Multi-Hosting
multi_hosting.description: Deploy, configure, start, stop, and manage multiple separate FXServer instances from a single panel.

multi_hosting.no_servers_desc: Deploy or link your first FXServer configuration to get started.
multi_hosting.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this server configuration?
multi_hosting.err_fields: Failed to save server configuration. Please check the fields.
multi_hosting.err_port: Invalid port. Must be between 1024 and 65535.
multi_hosting.base_dir_path: Base Directory Path (where server will be created/deployed)

auth_error.restart_desc: If you closed vibeSM, please restart it and try again.

2fa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
2fa.setup_required: Two-Factor Authentication is required by global settings.
2fa.secured_msg: Your account is secured with an Authenticator app. You will be prompted to enter a verification code when logging in with your password.
2fa.intro_msg: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security to your account by requiring a verification code from an Authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator, Authy, Microsoft Authenticator) when logging in.
2fa.scan_msg: Scan the QR code with your Authenticator app, or enter the manual key below. Then, enter the 6-digit code shown in the app to complete setup.
2fa.settings_switch: Require Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) for Web Panel access
2fa.settings_desc: When enabled, all administrators using password login will be forced to scan a QR code and configure 2FA upon login before they can access the web panel.
2fa.settings_only_master: Only a Master Account can change this setting.
